Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates Louisiana blue crabs. (Did you know Louisiana is the country's biggest producer?)
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics.
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: Emeril helps you wake up guests with coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present these hearty recipes.
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: We've all heard of soft shell crab, but did you know there's also soft shell shrimp?
Video.title: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Image.alt: A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp
A Real Catch: Soft Shell Shrimp

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Emeril shares his favorite burger recipes.
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Emeril shows a group of bachelors how to impress with a classic and affordable French dinner.
Video.title: Frugal French

Video.summary: Emeril makes Louisiana Bourbon the star ingredient in three recipes.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: Emeril is on a mission to bring back squab to the grill and to your plate!
Video.title: Bringing Back Squab

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates the flavorful Creole tomato, grown from rich soil of the Mississippi Delta.
Video.title: What's a Creole Tomato?

Video.summary: For your next get together, do it New Orleans-style with Emeril's traditional crawfish boil.
Video.title: Crawfish Celebration

Video.summary: Andouille is not just Jambalaya; try it in one of Emeril's show-stopping recipes.
Video.title: Andouille Sausage 101

Video.summary: Detroit Lions superfan Michael Banks and his wife, Rona, turn to grilled Tailgating fare.
Video.title: Detroit

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Cali-style carne asada burritos, crowd-pleasing chicken, and green chile nachos.
Video.title: Los Angeles Rams

Video.summary: Ponchatoula Strawberries, Crawfish Pie, Cochon de Lait, French Fry Po Boy
Video.title: Jazz Fest 2

Video.summary: Crawfish Bread, Baptist Church Fried Chicken Wings, Pralines
Video.title: Jazz Fest

Video.summary: Seafood Okra Gumbo, Chicken Sausage Gumbo
Video.title: Gumbo

Video.summary: Shrimp Salad, Couscous with Chili Sauce, Buttermilk Pie
Video.title: Southern Tastes

Video.summary: Tennessee Titans superfans Isaiah Washington and Jameson Greer take Southern home cooking to new heights.
Video.title: Nashville

Video.summary: Crispy Seared Snapper with Parsnip Slaw and Herb Jus, Annie's Peasant-Style Escolar
Video.title: New New Orleans Fish
